name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and foldable design. Compatible with all Bluetooth devices. Includes carrying case and 3.5mm audio cable.
alt_text: Black wireless over-ear headphones with noise-cancelling technology and cushioned ear pads
reviews: Amazing sound quality, totally worth it!
Battery life is incredible, love these.
A bit tight on my ears but sound is great.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Fully adjustable ergonomic chair with lumbar support, breathable mesh back, and 4D armrests. Supports up to 120kg. Ideal for long work sessions. Available in black and grey.
alt_text: Modern ergonomic office chair with adjustable height, lumbar support, and mesh back in black
reviews: My back pain disappeared after a week.
Assembly was a nightmare, instructions are terrible.
Comfortable but the armrests feel cheap.
Horrible chair

name: Slim Fit Denim Jacket
description: Classic slim-fit denim jacket in washed blue. Features two chest pockets, button closure, and a comfortable stretch fabric. Machine washable. Available in sizes XS–XXL.
alt_text: Classic blue denim jacket with button closure, chest pockets, and slim fit design
reviews: Great quality for the price!
Runs small, order a size up.
Love the fit and the colour.

name: Pro Wireless Gaming Headset
description: High-fidelity wireless gaming headset with 7.1 surround sound, detachable noise-cancelling microphone, and 20-hour battery. Compatible with PC, PS5, and Xbox. Memory foam ear cushions for extended sessions.
alt_text: Black wireless gaming headset with RGB lighting, padded ear cups, and detachable microphone
reviews: Surround sound is insane, totally immersive.
Mic quality is surprisingly good for the price.
Comfortable even after 5-hour sessions.
Wireless range is excellent, no dropouts.
The RGB is a nice touch but not overdone.

name: Razer DeathAdder V3 Gaming Mouse
description: Ultralight ergonomic gaming mouse with Razer Focus Pro 30K optical sensor, 90-hour battery life, and HyperSpeed wireless technology. 5 programmable buttons. Ideal for FPS and competitive gaming.
alt_text: Black Razer DeathAdder V3 wireless gaming mouse with ergonomic shape and Razer logo
reviews: Best mouse I've ever used, sensor is flawless.
The weight is perfect, feels like nothing in your hand.
Battery lasts forever, I charge it once a week.
Clicks are crisp and satisfying.
Worth every cent, massive upgrade from my old mouse.

name: Wireless Pro Controller Gamepad
description: Ergonomic wireless gamepad compatible with PC, Android, and most consoles. Features dual vibration motors, programmable back buttons, 15-hour battery, and a 2.4GHz dongle for lag-free input. Also works via Bluetooth.
alt_text: Black wireless gamepad controller with dual analog sticks, triggers, and LED indicator
reviews: Feels great in the hands, solid build quality.
Works perfectly on PC with no setup needed.
The back buttons are a game changer for competitive play.
Vibration could be stronger but it's decent.
Had connectivity issues at first but a firmware update fixed it.

name: Graphics Drawing Tablet
description: Professional graphics tablet with 8192 levels of pen pressure, 10x6 inch active area, and tilt recognition. Includes a battery-free stylus and 8 customisable express keys. Compatible with Photoshop, Illustrator, Clip Studio Paint, and more.
alt_text: Black graphics drawing tablet with stylus pen and express keys on the left side
reviews: Pen pressure is very responsive, great for illustration.
Driver installation was a pain on Windows 11.
Active area is large enough for professional work.
The express keys are useful once you configure them.
Pen nibs wear out faster than expected.
Good value compared to Wacom but build feels cheaper.

name: Smart Watch Series X
description: Feature-packed smartwatch with AMOLED display, GPS, heart rate and SpO2 monitoring, sleep tracking, and 7-day battery life. Water resistant to 50m. Compatible with iOS and Android. Includes two interchangeable bands.
alt_text: Black smartwatch with AMOLED display showing fitness stats and a silicone sport band
reviews: Battery life is nowhere near 7 days, more like 3.
The GPS takes forever to lock on.
Heart rate monitor is inaccurate during workouts.
Display looks great though, very sharp.
App is buggy and crashes frequently.
Returned it after two weeks, not worth the price.
